Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 220 

REV_CNTR_CD 

LABEL: Revenue Center Code 

DESCRIPTION: A code which identifies a specific accommodation, ancillary service or billing calculation (as defined by 
UB-04 Billing Manual). 

SHORT NAME: REV_CNTR_CD 

LONG NAME: REV_CNTR_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 4 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP line 
LT line 
OT line 

VALUES: This code set is an external
